root_text.iti27:2.1: “Yāni kānici, bhikkhave, opadhikāni puññakiriyavatthūni sabbāni tāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā kalaṁ nāgghanti soḷasiṁ.
root_text.iti27:2.2: Mettāyeva tāni cetovimutti adhiggahetvā bhāsate ca tapate ca virocati ca.
root_text.iti27:3.1: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, yā kāci tārakarūpānaṁ pabhā sabbā tā candiyā pabhāya kalaṁ nāgghanti soḷasiṁ, candapabhāyeva tā adhiggahetvā bhāsate ca tapate ca virocati ca;
root_text.iti27:3.2: evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, yāni kānici opadhikāni puññakiriyavatthūni sabbāni tāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā kalaṁ nāgghanti soḷasiṁ, mettāyeva tāni cetovimutti adhiggahetvā bhāsate ca tapate ca virocati ca.
root_text.iti27:4.1: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, vassānaṁ pacchime māse saradasamaye viddhe vigatavalāhake deve ādicco nabhaṁ abbhussakkamāno sabbaṁ ākāsagataṁ tamagataṁ abhivihacca bhāsate ca tapate ca virocati ca;
root_text.iti27:4.2: evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, yāni kānici opadhikāni puññakiriyavatthūni sabbāni tāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā kalaṁ nāgghanti soḷasiṁ, mettāyeva tāni cetovimutti adhiggahetvā bhāsate ca tapate ca virocati ca.
root_text.iti27:5.1: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ osadhitārakā bhāsate ca tapate ca virocati ca;
root_text.iti27:5.2: evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, yāni kānici opadhikāni puññakiriyavatthūni sabbāni tāni mettāya cetovimuttiyā kalaṁ nāgghanti soḷasiṁ, mettāyeva tāni cetovimutti adhiggahetvā bhāsate ca tapate ca virocati cā”ti.
root_text.iti27:11.1: Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.

translation_text.iti27:1.1: This was said by the Buddha, the Perfected One: that is what I heard.
translation_text.iti27:2.1: “Mendicants, of all the grounds for making worldly merit, none are worth a sixteenth part of the heart’s release by love.
translation_text.iti27:2.2: Surpassing them, the heart’s release by love shines and glows and radiates.
translation_text.iti27:3.1: It’s like how the radiance of all the stars is not worth a sixteenth part of the moon’s radiance. Surpassing them, the moon’s radiance shines and glows and radiates.
translation_text.iti27:3.2: In the same way, of all the grounds for making worldly merit, none are worth a sixteenth part of the heart’s release by love. Surpassing them, the heart’s release by love shines and glows and radiates.
translation_text.iti27:4.1: It’s like the last month of the rainy season, in autumn, when the heavens are sunny and cloudless. And as the sun is rising to the firmament, having dispelled all the darkness of space, it shines and glows and radiates.
translation_text.iti27:4.2: In the same way, of all the grounds for making worldly merit, none are worth a sixteenth part of the heart’s release by love. Surpassing them, the heart’s release by love shines and glows and radiates.
translation_text.iti27:5.1: It’s like how, at the crack of dawn, the Morning Star shines and glows and radiates.
translation_text.iti27:5.2: In the same way, of all the grounds for making worldly merit, none are worth a sixteenth part of the heart’s release by love. Surpassing them, the heart’s release by love shines and glows and radiates.”
translation_text.iti27:7.1: Loving just one creature with a hateless heart
translation_text.iti27:7.4: a noble one creates abundant merit.
translation_text.iti27:8.1: The royal potentates conquered this land
translation_text.iti27:8.4: the sacrifices of the ‘casting of the yoke-pin’, <j>the ‘royal soma drinking’, and the ‘unimpeded’.
translation_text.iti27:9.1: These are not worth a sixteenth part
translation_text.iti27:9.2: of the mind developed with love,
translation_text.iti27:9.3: as starlight cannot rival the moon.
translation_text.iti27:10.1: Don’t kill or cause others to kill,
translation_text.iti27:10.2: don’t conquer or encourage others to conquer,
translation_text.iti27:10.3: with love for all living creatures—
translation_text.iti27:10.4: you’ll have no enmity for anyone.”
translation_text.iti27:11.1: This too is a matter that was spoken by the Blessed One: that is what I heard.

variant_text.iti27:4.1: deve → nabhe (bj, pts-vp-pli1) | abbhussakkamāno → abbhuggamamāno (Ma-aka) | ākāsagataṁ → ākāsaṁ (sya-all) | abhivihacca → abhihacca (sya-all)

reference_text.iti27:5.1: csp1ed18.209, csp2ed18.209, mc0.251, ms18It_159, ndp20.197, pts-vp-pli21
